title: Trailer Immersion
description: The best trailer-based immersive modpack for minecraft
body:
Trailer Immersion for minecraft 1.21 Fabric is the best trailer based modpack in modrinth. It aims to give minecraft a complete trailer look and feel and also make it immersive. Using resource packs like Bare Bones and Fresh animations to make it the perfect trailer experience. Includes mods like Camera Overhaul and First Person Model to give it immersion. This is my first modpack so constructive critism is needed.

![Forest Landscape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51a7d541c77a99b73c41017ba40fae4f93cf4800.jpeg)

You can toggle the first person model (your player visible in first person) at any time by pressing B

I rewatched all the newest minecraft trailers so I could pick out the best mods, resource packs and shaders.

I am currently playing and updating this modpack on a laptop so it has a lot of performance mods.

I suggest you use one of these skins while playing (save the image file and equip it in minecraft launcher)

![Bare Bones style Steve skin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/423337a218e62601fe6bca3940ba8110a912db10.png)

![Bare Bones style Alex skin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c043df5ae071fed37aa7c2b16d0594f4fb02316.png)
